text: We’ll help you define your ideal viewer, understand what they care about, and build a video plan that educates, earns trust, and drives action across every stage of your funnel.
path: div#w-node-_30116479-8fed-6e09-4b6e-0564ed62c7f1-c7295ef5 > div.container-2.align-left > p.paragraph
div#w-node-_30116479-8fed-6e09-4b6e-0564ed62c7f9-c7295ef5 > h2.xomai-large

text: Step Two: No Guesswork. Just Clear Direction.
path: div#w-node-_30116479-8fed-6e09-4b6e-0564ed62c7f9-c7295ef5 > div.container-2.align-left > h3

text: We turn your strategy into clear scripts, visual references, and filming prompts, so you know exactly what to say, how to say it, and what to capture. You just hit record, and we do the rest.
path: div#w-node-_30116479-8fed-6e09-4b6e-0564ed62c7f9-c7295ef5 > div.container-2.align-left > p.paragraph
div#w-node-_30116479-8fed-6e09-4b6e-0564ed62c804-c7295ef5 > h2.xomai-large

path: div#w-node-_30116479-8fed-6e09-4b6e-0564ed62c804-c7295ef5 > div.container-2.align-left > h3

div#panel-okta > div.a2cs-story > div.a2cs-block > div.a2cs-block-label.a2cs-before

text: Auth0's YouTube channel was stalling. Losing subscribers monthly despite existing content. Years of paid ad spend had inflated view counts, but organic engagement was flat. The channel needed a strategy that turned views into real developer engagement and event registrations.
path: div#panel-okta > div.a2cs-story > div.a2cs-block > p
div#panel-okta > div.a2cs-story > div.a2cs-block > div.a2cs-block-label.a2cs-after

text: The channel went from bleeding subscribers to 22K+ new organic subscribers and 5.2M+ views with minimal ad spend. Video content drove 35% of registrations for Oktane and Developer Day virtual events, turning content into a measurable pipeline driver for developer signups and product adoption.
path: div#panel-okta > div.a2cs-story > div.a2cs-block > p
div#panel-okta > div.a2cs-built > div.a2cs-built-label > span.a2cs-icon
div#panel-okta > div.a2cs-built > div.a2cs-built-label

text: We revived Auth0's YouTube channel and took them multichannel across YouTube, LinkedIn, and TikTok. We launched focused developer education series, produced content for the main Okta channel, and built video funnels that drove developer signups for the Oktane and Developer Day virtual events. Instead of chasing virality, we created consistent streams of content that educated developers and fostered community, turning Auth0 into a trusted resource for developers globally.
path: div#panel-okta > div.a2cs-built > p
div#panel-okta > div.a2cs-outcome

text: Video now drives event registrations, developer adoption, and stakeholder buy-in.
path: div#panel-okta > div.a2cs-outcome > strong

text: PartnerHacker was a brand new company with a hypothesis: partnerships needed its own media brand. They had an audience, but no video team and a small content library. They needed to turn attention into authority fast in a space dominated by established players.
path: div#panel-partnerhacker > div.a2cs-story > div.a2cs-block > p
div#panel-partnerhacker > div.a2cs-story > div.a2cs-block > div.a2cs-block-label.a2cs-after

text: We became their first video hire and built the content engine from day one. Within months, PartnerHacker was recognized at events, leading conversations on LinkedIn, and positioned as the definitive voice in the partnerships space. Alongside them, using video, we coined Nearbound, a term that became an industry standard alongside inbound and outbound. It showed up on hiring boards, was adopted by other companies to describe their go-to-market motions, and the term has since evolved into ELG (Ecosystem Led Growth).
path: div#panel-partnerhacker > div.a2cs-story > div.a2cs-block > p
div#panel-partnerhacker > div.a2cs-built > div.a2cs-built-label > span.a2cs-icon
div#panel-partnerhacker > div.a2cs-built > div.a2cs-built-label

text: We produced 50 pieces of content across webinars, podcasts, short video clips, and full-funnel video (top, middle, and bottom of funnel). We helped host the largest partnerships webinar in history at the time (5,000 attendees), closed $900K+ in sponsorships, and built the video presence that made PartnerHacker synonymous with partner-led growth.
path: div#panel-partnerhacker > div.a2cs-built > p
div#panel-partnerhacker > div.a2cs-outcome
div#panel-partnerhacker > div.a2cs-outcome > strong

text: Our organization initially hired a2 Media to handle post-production, assist with video strategy, and to help improve the overall quality of our video content. I couldn't be happier with their services over the last 6 months. Within the first month of hiring a2 Media, we experienced record numbers on our YouTube channel, which speaks volumes about their impact. a2 has helped us create a range of content including animated short-form content, scripted short-form content, long-form explainer videos for YouTube, and long-form presentations for virtual events.
path: div#w-slider-mask-0 > div.slide.w-slide > div.testimonial-wrapper > div.margin-42 > div.testimonial-copy

text: Ademola, the owner of a2Media, is an absolute pleasure to work with . He's transparent, kind, empathetic, and I trust him to bring on the right talent whenever additional help is needed. The editors and collaborators we work with at a2 have been wonderful as well. Everyone is open to receiving critical feedback, eager to learn, and highly professional. In addition to that, their response times are impressive and honest while remaining light-hearted, making collaboration a blast.
path: div#w-slider-mask-0 > div.slide.w-slide > div.testimonial-wrapper > div.margin-42 > div.testimonial-copy

text: Ademola and his team are quick to resolve any issues and provide updates clearly and consistently, which has made the entire process seamless. I would highly recommend a2 Media for corporate video projects, especially in the SaaS space. Their roster of talent is gifted at bringing ideas to life and making content that resonates with their target audience. If you're looking for a reliable partner to elevate your video content, a2 Media is a great agency to partner with!
path: div#w-slider-mask-0 > div.slide.w-slide > div.testimonial-wrapper > div.margin-42 > div.testimonial-copy
div#w-slider-mask-0 > div.slide.w-slide > div.testimonial-wrapper > div._15-margin > div.testimonial-info.name
div#w-slider-mask-0 > div.slide.w-slide > div.testimonial-wrapper > div > div.testimonial-info

text: "Simply put, a2 is the best production studio I've worked with. Their work is world-class, their communication is incredible, and their turnaround times are insane. But the best part about working with a2 is the people... They're just good people who actually give a shit about us, our business, and what we're trying to accomplish."
path: div#w-slider-mask-0 > div.slide.w-slide > div.testimonial-wrapper > div.margin-42 > div.testimonial-copy

text: a2 is doing an outstanding job on video production. I shared a recording of a longer panel discussion with them, asking to create a few shareable highlights for Linkedin. With minimal guidance, they created masterpieces. Honestly, way beyond my expectations! Highly recommend Ademola and his team, and will definitely continue working with him!
path: div#w-slider-mask-0 > div.slide.w-slide > div.testimonial-wrapper > div.margin-42 > div.testimonial-copy

text: I've been really lucky to get to work with Ademola and his a2 Media team for a few years now on numerous projects. In my opinion, there is no other studio that does it better. Not only do they product the best video content in B2B, but theyr are just flat out great people who love what they do.
path: div#w-slider-mask-0 > div.slide.w-slide > div.testimonial-wrapper > div.margin-42 > div.testimonial-copy

text: I love getting into a room with the a2 team, sharing my crazy ideas, and seeing them take those ideas and turn them into something even better than I imagined: fun, fresh, and effective video campaigns. Dont waste your time anywhere else.

nav#w-dropdown-list-0 > div.answer > p.answer-text > strong
nav#w-dropdown-list-0 > div.answer > p.answer-text

text: AKA Minimal. We built our process so you can stay focused on running your business. After an initial strategy session and a few async check-ins, we handle almost everything. Strategy, scripts, creative direction, and editing, and publishing. Most clients spend less than 2 hours a week with us, and that time gets shorter as we learn your voice and brand.
path: nav#w-dropdown-list-0 > div.answer > p.answer-text

text: We start with a deep-dive into your ICP, your sales cycle, and the content gaps that are costing you pipeline. From there, we build a video strategy tailored to your buyer's journey. By the end of month one, you'll have a clear roadmap, your first batch of videos ready to use by your sales team, and then we get into systemizing it over the next 6 months.
path: nav#w-dropdown-list-1 > div.answer > p.answer-text

text: You'll have a fully built video strategy and your first content in market. From there, most clients move into the Video Growth Engine, our ongoing retainer where we execute, optimize, and scale what's working. But there's no lock-in between plans. The Accelerator is designed to stand on its own, so if you want to take the playbook and run with it internally, you absolutely can.
path: nav#w-dropdown-list-2 > div.answer > p.answer-text

text: We use self-reported attribution ("how did you hear about us?" on forms and in sales calls) to capture the touchpoints analytics teams often miss, like someone binging your LinkedIn videos for weeks before booking a call. We also monitor last-touch attribution from your CRM to see which specific videos influenced closed deals. And we track leading indicators like time-to-close, video engagement from target accounts, and pipeline velocity. For example, one of our previous clients saw a 42% reduction in their sales cycle and $600K in video-attributed revenue. And we kept the tracking side of things simple.
path: nav#w-dropdown-list-3 > div.answer > p.answer-text

text: P.S. If your team already has a way of measuring, we layer into how you do it best.
path: nav#w-dropdown-list-3 > div.answer > p.answer-text

text: That's actually most of our clients. Here's a pattern we see all the time: a company hires a freelancer or agency, gets a batch of nice-looking videos, posts them, and nothing happens. The issue wasn't the video itself, it was the absence of strategy. No ICP targeting, no distribution plan, no alignment with the sales cycle. So we've committed to doing it differently. Every video we build is mapped to a specific stage, a specific audience, and a specific outcome.
path: nav#w-dropdown-list-4 > div.answer > p.answer-text

text: Absolutely. We regularly repurpose existing webinars, podcasts, product demos, event recordings, and founder content into high-performing short-form and long-form video. If you've got raw footage sitting in a Google Drive somewhere, we'll turn it into content that actually drives conversations. As long as it fits into the strategy that we've set for you, that is.
path: nav#w-dropdown-list-5 > div.answer > p.answer-text

text: An in-house editor gives you execution but not strategy. AI gives you speed but not differentiation. You'd still need a strategist, a creative director, a project manager, and a distribution plan, AKA 4+ roles on top of the editor. We replace all of that. And unlike AI-generated content that your competitors can replicate overnight, the work we build together compounds over time and becomes impossible to copy.
